learnings: Implemented a persistent Mission system (core/autonomy/mission_engine.py) to bridge high-level goals with individual tasks.
Integrated a security guardrail in SafePatchEngine to block destructive shell commands and credential access during autonomous patching.
Enhanced the Cockpit Operational Dashboard with Mission Control visibility, incorporating live telemetry and knowledge feeds.
Established a mandatory approval flow in the ExecutionSupervisor for mission-critical tasks and high-risk patches.
Implemented resource watchdogs in RuntimeWatchdog to prevent CPU/RAM runaway during cognition cycles.
Standardized widget instantiation in Cockpit to ensure non-blocking/lazy loading patterns.
patterns: Used a decorator-like approach (though implemented via explicit checks) for approval gates on MISSION_TASK objectives.
Leveraged the existing storage_manager to persist mission state across restarts.
Matched UI widget patterns (QVBoxLayout/QListWidget) to maintain consistency with existing Cockpit modules.
